coreTruthSet.description: He observes coordination and low conflict but misclassifies systemic alignment as merely group-specific custom.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: He notices subtle coordination ... But ... sees difference in custom.

coreTruthSet.description: Scene 8 is explicitly designed to show the same social reality through an external cultural lens rather than internal system fluency.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Scene 8 ... from the outside looking in.

coreTruthSet.description: Core misunderstanding is underestimating integrative sophistication, responsiveness, and scalability of the observed system.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: He does NOT recognize how integrated and adaptive their system is.

coreTruthSet.description: Authority legibility gap arises because he expects dominance markers and misses alignment-based power expression.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: He sees no obvious dominance ... no clear command.

coreTruthSet.description: Host elder perspective is respectful and cautious, interpreting differences as custom variation without immediate hostility.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: There is no hostility ... But there is distance.

settingAnchors.name: Host-Community Observation Field
settingAnchors.description: Intertribal contact space where external observers parse unfamiliar spatial and authority signals through home-culture filters.

continuityConstraints.title: Authority Readability Cross-Culture
continuityConstraints.text: Authority models based on dominance cues fail to read alignment-based leadership in unfamiliar systems.

continuityConstraints.title: Respectful Distance Observer Mode
continuityConstraints.text: Non-hostile distance can preserve diplomatic safety while still producing major interpretive blind spots.

openResearchGaps.title: How can alignment-based authority cues be translated to observers trained on dominance-based hierarchies?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to write legible cross-cultural power scenes without flattening either model.

openResearchGaps.title: Which moments can plausibly shift the elder from custom-only interpretation toward recognizing systemic sophistication?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed for believable progression in intertribal understanding arcs.

openResearchGaps.title: What staging signals best preserve respectful distance without implying hostility or indifference?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed for nuanced diplomatic tone control.
